节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Declare the graphic format of the bar chart.
The actual layout width of the TabBar is used. If the width exceeds the total width, you can slide the tabbar.
The width of all TabBars is evenly allocated.
Declare the animation mode of tab content.
Start animation after tabcontent is fully measured.
Start animation before tabcontent is fully measured.
Disable default animation.
Jump to some index near the target without animation, then start animation after tabcontent is fully measured.
Jump to some index near the target without animation, then start animation before tabcontent is fully measured.
Declare the location of the bar chart.
When the vertical attribute method is set to true, the tab is on the left of the container. When the vertical property method is set to false, the tab is at the top of the container.
When the vertical attribute method is set to true, the tab is located on the right of the container. When the vertical property method is set to false, the tab is at the bottom of the container.
Declare the layout style of the tab bar items.
The tab bar items are laid in the center of the tab bar.
The tab bar items are laid in the tab bar by an average split.

The tab bar items are laid in the center of the bar when their total length is more than half of the tab bar. Otherwise, they are laid in the center half of the tab bar with the same space between them.
Provides methods for switching tabs.
constructor.
Called when the tab is switched.

Called when need to preload specified tab content.
1. The parameter type is not Array.
2. The parameter is an empty array.
3. The parameter contains an invalid index.
注释信息: @param { Optional<Array<number>> } indices - Indices of tab content to be preloaded.
@returns { Promise<void> } The promise returned by the function.

parameters.说明: Indices of tab content to be preloaded.

节点.return_description: The promise returned by the function.

节点.功能描述: Set tab bar translate.
Set tab bar opacity.
Options used to create Tabs.
Set the tab location for Tabs.
Set the index of the currently displayed tab.
Set the Tabs controller.
Set common attributes to tabbar.
Provides an interface for switching views.
Called when the view is switched.
Provides an interface for the style of an divider including stroke width, color, start margin and end margin
Define the stroke width of the divider
Define the color of the divider
Define the start margin of the divider
Define the end margin of the divider
Provides an interface for tabs animation.
Offset of the current page to the start position of the tabs main axis. The unit is vp.
Offset of the target page to the start position of the tabs main axis. The unit is vp.
Start speed of the page-turning animation. The unit is vp/s.
Provides an interface for the grid column options of an tab bar including sm, md, lg, margin and gutter.
Define the occupied column number when the screen is of small size
Define the occupied column number when the screen is of middle size
Define the occupied column number when the screen is of large size
Define the margin size of the columns
Define the gutter size of the columns
Provides an interface for the options for the scrollable bar mode including margin and nonScrollableLayoutStyle.
Define the margin size of the bar items when the tab bar is scrollable.
Define the layout style of the bar items when the tab bar is not scrollable.
Defines the tabs attribute functions.
Called when determining whether the tab is vertical.
Called when determining the location of the bar chart.
Called when judging whether page switching can be performed by sliding left and right.
Called when the graphic format of the bar chart is selected as fixed mode.
Called when the graphic format of the bar chart is selected as scrollable mode.
注释信息: @param { ScrollableBarModeOptions } [options] - options indicate the options for the scrollable bar mode

parameters.说明: ScrollableBarModeOptions } [options] - options indicate the options for the scrollable bar mode

节点.功能描述: Called when the graphic format of the bar chart is selected.
注释信息: @param { ScrollableBarModeOptions } [options] - options indicate the options for the scrollable bar mode

parameters.说明: ScrollableBarModeOptions } [options] - options indicate the options for the scrollable bar mode

节点.功能描述: Called when the width of the bar graph is set. Notice: barWidth only supports Number type on 7, supports Length type since 8.
Called when the height of the bar graph is set. Notice: barHeight only supports Number type on 7, supports Length type since 8.
Called when the animation duration of the bar graph is set.
Set animation mode.
注释信息: @param { Optional<AnimationMode> } mode - animation mode for tabs switch animation

parameters.说明: animation mode for tabs switch animation

节点.功能描述: Set the effect used when the component is at one of the edges.
注释信息: @param { Optional<EdgeEffect> } edgeEffect - the effect used when the component is at one of the edges

parameters.说明: the effect used when the component is at one of the edges

节点.功能描述: Called when the tab is switched.
Called when the tab is clicked.

Called when the tab content flip animation start. "index": the index value of the tab that when animation start. "targetIndex": the target index value of the tab that when animation start. "event": the animation event callback info.
Called when the tab content flip animation end. "index": the index value of the tab that when animation start. "event": the animation event callback info.
Called when swiping the tab content with the gesture. "index": the index value of the tab that when animation start. "event": the animation event callback info.
Set whether the edges of tab bar are fading.
注释信息: @param { boolean } value - indicates whether the edges of tab bar are fading.
@returns { TabsAttribute } the attribute of the tabs

parameters.说明: indicates whether the edges of tab bar are fading.

节点.功能描述: Set the divider between tab bar and tab content.
注释信息: @param { DividerStyle | null } value - indicates the style of the indicator.
@returns { TabsAttribute } the attribute of the tabs

parameters.说明: indicates the style of the indicator.

节点.功能描述: Set whether the tab bar overlaps with the tab content.
注释信息: @param { boolean } value - indicates whether the tab bar overlaps with the tab content.
@returns { TabsAttribute } the attribute of the tabs

parameters.说明: indicates whether the tab bar overlaps with the tab content.

节点.功能描述: Set the background color of the tab bar.
注释信息: @param { ResourceColor } value - indicates the background color of the tab bar.
@returns { TabsAttribute } the attribute of the tabs

parameters.说明: indicates the background color of the tab bar.

节点.功能描述: Set the grid alignment options of the tab bar.
注释信息: @param { BarGridColumnOptions } value - indicates the bar grid alignment options.
@returns { TabsAttribute } the attribute of the tabs

parameters.说明: indicates the bar grid alignment options.

节点.功能描述: Custom tab content transition animation. When undefined is set, this interface does not take effect.
注释信息: @param { function } delegate - custom content transition animation.
@returns { TabsAttribute } the attribute of the tabs

节点.功能描述: Set the BlurStyle of the tab bar.
注释信息: @param { BlurStyle } value - indicates the  BlurStyle of the tab bar.
@returns { TabsAttribute } the attribute of the tabs

parameters.说明: indicates the  BlurStyle of the tab bar.

节点.功能描述: Setting page flip mode on mouse wheel event.
注释信息: @param { Optional<PageFlipMode> } mode - page flip mode on mouse wheel event. The default value is PageFlipMode.CONTINUOUS.

parameters.说明: page flip mode on mouse wheel event. The default value is PageFlipMode.CONTINUOUS.

节点.功能描述: Called when content will change. "currentIndex": the index value of the current tab. "comingIndex": the index value of the tab that will change. Tabs can change from currentIndex to comingIndex if function return true. Tabs can not change from currentIndex to comingIndex if function return false.
Defines the Tab Content animated transition options.
Defines the timeout of custom content transition animation. The unit is ms. If TabContentTransitionProxy.finishTransition() is not invoked, use the timeout as animation end time.
Called when custom content transition animation start.
The proxy of TabContentAnimatedTransition.
The index of current tab content.
The index of target tab content.
Notifies Tabs component the custom content transition animation is complete.
CommonModifier
Defines Tabs Component.
Defines Tabs Component instance.
